About this item

  • LOUD, PUNCHY AUDIO - 14W of room-filling power driven by a 52mm dynamic driver and XBASS technology - delivering deep bass and crisp highs that punch well above its compact size. One of India's top-rated portable speakers.
  • 16-HOUR MARATHON BATTERY - Play non-stop from morning to midnight on a single charge. 16 hours of continuous playback keeps the music going through beach days, road trips, and long house parties - no power bank needed.
  • TWS STEREO PAIRING - DOUBLE THE SOUND - Link them wirelessly with True Wireless Stereo (TWS) for a full left-right stereo experience. Perfect for filling larger rooms or splitting audio across two ends of a venue.
  • SPLASH-RESISTANT & DROP-READY BUILD - Sweat and splash-resistant body with an anti-vibe grip base keeps the speaker stable even when the music hits hard. Built tough for poolside sessions, gym use, and outdoor adventures.
  • GRAB & GO DESIGN - Built-in carry strap for one-hand portability, tactile top-panel controls you can operate without looking, and a non-slip rubber mat so it stays put on any surface. Compact enough for a backpack, powerful enough for a crowd.
